scripts package¶

Submodules¶

scripts.earthaccess_download module¶

scripts.earthaccess_download.authenticate(status_check=False)[source]¶

Authenticate Earthdata credentials and initialize a session

@author: Vincent Ribberink

Returns:
None
scripts.earthaccess_download.download(granules, download_dir)[source]¶

Download granules from NASA Earthdata

Parameters:
granuleslist

List of granule IDs

download_dirstring

Path of the download directory

Returns:
filelistlist

List of filepaths of downloaded granules

scripts.earthaccess_download.main()[source]¶

Run the earthaccess_download script

@author: Vincent Ribberink

Returns:
None
scripts.earthaccess_download.search(short_name, date_range, polygon)[source]¶

Query NASA EarthData products

@author: Vincent Ribberink

Parameters:
short_namestring

Short name of the Earthdata product (e.g. GEDI02_A)

date_rangetuple

Start and end date as strings in YYYY-MM-DD format

polygonlist

Linear ring of the input polygon

Returns:
granuleslist

List of granule IDs returned by the query

scripts.process_sat_lidar module¶

scripts.process_sat_lidar.aggregate(polygons_path, df, satellite_name, radius)[source]¶

Converts GEDI files from h5 to dataframes

@author: Ethan Gauthier (lead), Vincent Ribberink

Parameters:
polygon_pathstring

Path pointing to input geometry

dfPandas DataFrame

Extracted and filtered observations

satellite_namestring

Either “Icesat” or “GEDI”

radiusint

radius (m) for the dwithin spatial join

Returns:
agg: Pandas DataFrame

Aggregated Results

scripts.process_sat_lidar.compare_data(icesat_agg, gedi_agg)[source]¶

Compares ICESat canopy data with GEDI canopy data

@author: Joshua Salvador

Parameters:
icesat_aggdataframe

dataframe containing ICESat-2 ATL08 data

gedi_aggdataframe

dataframe containing ICESat-2 ATL08 data

Returns:
df3: dataframe

all compared results

scripts.process_sat_lidar.convert_gedi(granules, quality_flag)[source]¶

Converts GEDI L2A files from h5 to Pandas DataFrames

@author: Joshua Salvador (lead), Vincent Ribberink

Parameters:
fileslist

List containing paths of GEDI L2A .h5 granules

Returns:
final_dfPandas DataFrame

Contains extracted and filtered observations

scripts.process_sat_lidar.convert_icesat(granules, beam_type, night_only)[source]¶

Converts ICESat data from h5 files to Pandas DataFrames Extracts lat/long, canopy height and uncertainty Filters observations based on strong/weak beams and night flag (see config file) Based on Xarray documentation examples, altered for use with Pandas Dataframes

@authors: Vincent Ribberink, Joshua Salvador

Parameters:
test_fileslist

List containing paths of ICESat-2 ATL08 .h5 granules

Returns:
finalPandas DataFrame

Contains extracted and filtered observations

scripts.process_sat_lidar.download_check(download_dir, short_name)[source]¶

Prints important information about the granules in the download directory

@author: Vincent Ribberink

Parameters:
download_dirString

string path to the directory containing downloaded ATL08 and GEDI02_A .h5 granules

Returns:
icesat_only: bool

True if only ATL08 granules are found

gedi_only: bool

True if only GEDI02_A granules are found

ATL08_granules: list

List of ICESat-2 ATL08 granules in download directory

GEDI02_A_granules: list

List of GEDI L2A granules in download directory

scripts.process_sat_lidar.export(icesat_agg, gedi_agg, compared, config_dict)[source]¶

Format and export the aggregated and compared results as .shp, .csv, and/or .parquet

@author: Vincent Ribberink

Parameters:
icesat_aggPandas DataFrame

Aggregated ICESat-2 ATL08 data

gedi_aggPandas DataFrame

Aggregated GEDI L2A data

comparedPandas DataFrame

Comparison DataFrame of ICESat-2 ATL08 and GEDI L2A aggregated data

config_dictdictionary

dictionary of parameters

Returns:
None
scripts.process_sat_lidar.export_ATL08(icesat_agg, config_dict)[source]¶

Format and export the aggregated ICESat-2 ATL08 results as .shp, .csv, and/or .parquet

@author: Vincent Ribberink

Parameters:
icesat_aggPandas DataFrame

Aggregated ICESat-2 ATL08 data

config_dictdictionary

dictionary of parameters

Returns:
None
scripts.process_sat_lidar.export_GEDI02_A(gedi_agg, config_dict)[source]¶

Format and export the aggregated GEDI L2A results as .shp, .csv, and/or .parquet

@author: Vincent Ribberink

Parameters:
gedi_aggPandas DataFrame

Aggregated GEDI L2A data

config_dictdictionary

dictionary of parameters

Returns:
None
scripts.process_sat_lidar.main()[source]¶

Run the process_sat_lidar script. This does not download the granules from NASA - use earthaccess_download.py Input geometries, output directory, and chosen filters are written in the config file (default: config_process_sat_lidar.txt)

@author: Vincent Ribberink

Returns:
None.
scripts.process_sat_lidar.read_config(config_path)[source]¶

Read and validate parameters from a config file. Config file must be written in .ini format, though the file can be .txt Based on ConfigParser user guide: https://docs.python.org/3/library/configparser.html#quick-start

@author: Vincent Ribberink

Parameters:
config_pathstring

Path pointing to the config file

Returns:
config_dict (dictionary):

Dictionary containing the validated parameters as strings

scripts.user_input3 module¶

scripts.user_input3.write_user_config()[source]¶

Takes a user input to create a config file

@author: Ethan Gauthier

Returns:
None
